flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Brigham Young University-Idaho rose 11% between 2017 and 2020 ($12.6k → $14.0k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Brigham Young University-Idaho fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.0% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Brigham Young University-Idaho rose 35% between 2021 and 2024 (15.2% → 20.5%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Brigham Young University-Idaho rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 (49.6% → 55.5%).
